title: Cinatra WP/Drupal assistant — authenticated stream-init request (v1)
description: POST body the WordPress plugin / Drupal module sends to /api/{wordpress,drupal}/bundle.js's downstream stream endpoint (/api/agents/{wordpress,drupal}-content-editor/stream) to open an authenticated assistant session. Sent with `Authorization: Bearer <apiKey>`. The `contractVersion` field pins the plugin↔core wire contract so a plugin built against v0.1.0 fails loud (admin-visible error) rather than silently when Cinatra's contract later changes.

contractVersion.description: Pins the plugin↔core wire contract. Cinatra rejects unknown versions with an admin-visible structured error (not a 500).

messages.description: Conversation history. Cinatra retains only the last 20 user/assistant messages.

context.description: Per-page CMS context the assistant edits against. Field set differs by platform (WordPress: postId/postType/postStatus; Drupal: nodeId/nodeBundle/nodeStatus). All fields are string-typed and sanitised server-side before prompt embedding; additional fields are tolerated for forward compatibility.
